rulings.Case Title: EDWARD J CONNER VS. COUSINS/MYERS II, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 1.DEFENDANTs HELLER MANUS ARCHITECTS, JEFFREY HELLER's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Lacher v. Superior Court stands for the proposition that a builder who seeks approval from neighbors for a new building has a duty not to fraudulently misrepresent material facts of the design in order to secure approval/non-opposition from those neighbors. The 3 year SOL also does not bar the claim, because P was not put on reasonable notice of the encroachment until August 2006, when the building survey was conducted.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD J CONNER VS. COUSINS/MYERS II, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 1. DEFENDANTs COUSINS/MYERS II, LLC, MYERS DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, COUSINS PROPERTIES INCORPORATED, JACK MYERS' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED as to 3rd and 5th COAs. Lacher v. Superior Court stands for the proposition that a builder who seeks approval from neighbors for a new building has a duty not to fraudulently misrepresent material facts of the design in order to secure approval/non-opposition from those neighbors. The 3 year SOL also does not bar the claim, because P was not put on reasonable notice of the encroachment until August 2006, when the building survey was conducted. Motion is also denied because complaint alleges facts that if true could show agency relationship. Motion is GRANTED as to 2nd COA - promissory fraud - because this COA barred by economic loss rule. Motion is GRANTED as to 4th COA, continuous nuisance for water damage, because if it is a continuous nuisance claim it is barred by the 3-year Statute of Limitations because it does not relate back to the original filing of the complaint in 2009. Defendants have not owned or had any relationship to the property since 2005; because the claim was filed in 2013, it would only reach back to 2010. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: IN THE MATTER OF RUBY HERNANDEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 2. PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF RUBY HERNANDEZ's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien GRANTED. 90 days have elapsed, making the lien unenforceable and dismissal proper. See CCP § 8460 et seq. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN LENGYEL et al VS. NICHOLAS PREPOUSES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint Substituting Devednra Patel As Doe One And Other Amendments
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 3.PLAINTIFFs PEGGY LENOIR, JOHN LENGYEL, LORI PRZYBYLO, BRIAN JOHNSON, LORI PRZYBLO, LAKEYSHA WHITE, GREGORY LEWIS' Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint Substituting Devednra Patel As Doe One And Other Amendments GRANTED. Motion is unopposed and amendment is proper based on discovery that Patel has a lease on the subject property.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 4.CROSS DEFENDANT VLAD COOD DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to COA 3, defamation. Quoted statement can reasonably be construed as defamatory per se. Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to COAs 1, 2, 4, 5 & 6, with leave to allege facts sufficient to show he is a proper defendant, and to allege facts sufficient to constitute outrageous behavior as to COA 4. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED's Motion To Compel DENIED. Responses were filed June 5, 2014.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 4.CROSS DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC,'s Motion To Deem Matters Admitted DENIED. Hom's failure to respond to email was excusable neglect in light of title and originating email address.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 01, 2014 line 4.CROSS DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. The demurrer is SUSTAINED as to COA 2 based on failure to allege Pure's performance was required and failure to plead facts to show any special relationship or other conduct justifying a claim of breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing, with leave to amend to plead such facts. The demurrer is OVERRULED as to COA 3, defamation. Quoted statement can reasonably be construed as defamatory per se. Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to COA 4, for failure to state facts constituting outrageous behavior, with leave to amend. Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to COA 6, declaratory relief, with leave to amend to remove requests for declaratory relief as to past duties.= (501/REQ)
